title: April 14
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|April|hide31=yes}}
'''April 14''' is the 104th day of the year (105th in leap years). There are 261 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1942|1942]] – [[Robert Dalva]] is born.
*[[1950s#1954|1954]] – [[Chuck Dixon]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Alan Ruscoe]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Sarah Michelle Gellar]] is born.
*[[1995]] – [[Burl Ives]] dies.
*[[1999]] – [[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 6|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 6]] published.
*[[2010]] – [[Dark Times 16|''Dark Times'' 16]] published.
*[[2011]] – [http://www.starwars.com/vault/books/whatsnew_apr11/index.html ''Star Wars Galaxy Comic #7''] published.
*2011 – [http://www.starwars.com/vault/books/whatsnew_apr11/index.html ''Star Wars: The Clone Wars: A Jedi Adventure in 3-D''] published.
*[[2013]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Rise of the Hutt Cartel]]'' released.
*[[2015]] – The [[original trilogy]] published as ''[[Star Wars Epic Yarns]]'': [[Star Wars Epic Yarns: A New Hope|''A New Hope'']], [[Star Wars Epic Yarns: The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']] & [[Star Wars Epic Yarns: Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']].
*[[2017]] – "[[BB-8 Bandits]]" airs at [[Celebration Orlando]].
*[[2021]] – [[Bounty Hunters 11|''Bounty Hunters'' 11]] published.
*[[2022]] – [[Rio Hackford]] dies.
*[[2026]] – ''[[Last Shot]]'' to be reprinted in paperback.
*2026 – [[Phasma (novel)|''Phasma'']] to be reprinted in paperback.
*2026 – [[Tarkin (novel)|''Tarkin'']] to be reprinted in paperback.
*2026 – ''[[Galactic Adventures Storybook Collection]]'' to be reprinted.
*2026 – [[Galactic Adventures Storybook Collection (audiobook)|''Galactic Adventures Storybook Collection'' audiobook]] to be released.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knights Vol. 2 – A Higher Path]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars: Visions (trade paperback)]]'' to be reprinted.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars: Where Are the Mandalorian and Grogu? Search the Galaxy]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[We Are One]]'' to be published.
<noinclude>
